name: io.github.ar-agents/mcp
description: MCP server exposing the @ar-agents/* toolkit: 235 typed tools for Argentina (CUIT/AFIP identity, Mercado Pago, Mercado Libre, WhatsApp Business, banking, factura electronica, IGJ, Boletin Oficial, GDE/TAD, shipping, fiscal calculators). Open infrastructure for Argentina's sociedades de IA.
